subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Mirza Mahdi, who was encompassed by His all-embracing mercy, was uniquely favored and, in all circumstances, engaged in transcribing the Words of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب میرزا مهدی برحمه محیط مخصوص بوده و در جمیع حال از استکتاب کلمات الله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
